name: solo-npm
description: Seven skills for AI-driven solo-dev npm publishing — full lifecycle: bootstrap (/solo-npm:init, /solo-npm:trust), per-release (/solo-npm:release, /solo-npm:verify), portfolio operations (/solo-npm:status, /solo-npm:audit, /solo-npm:deps). OIDC + provenance. Release and verify are designed to be wrapped per-repo via thin wrappers.
author: Gabriel Llamas
